api_key.description: Simplesat API token, sent as the X-Simplesat-Token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Simplesat v1 API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Number of records requested per page (page_size query param), 1-250 (customers) or provider default elsewhere.

created_after.description: Optional customers-stream created_after (RFC3339) query filter, passed through verbatim.
